config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society’s interests matter, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because that opens the door to abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, a healthy society protects personal freedoms first and only limits them when there is a clear, necessary reason to protect others. Coming from Indonesia, I also think we know how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence, so I’m cautious about giving society priority by default.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu justru menjadi pagar utama terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas, dan tanpa pagar itu “kepentingan bersama” mudah dipakai sebagai alasan untuk membungkam orang. Tentu ada situasi ketika hak individu perlu dibatasi, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan benar-benar perlu untuk melindungi orang lain, bukan sekadar karena masyarakat ingin hasil yang lebih nyaman. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menang atas individu, melainkan yang cukup kuat untuk melindungi kebebasan sambil tetap menjaga ketertiban.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society’s interests should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because that is too easy to abuse and too vague in practice. From an Indonesian perspective, I am especially wary of how appeals to harmony, order, or the common good can be used to pressure people into silence or make minorities conform. At the same time, I do not think individual rights are absolute in every case; they can be limited when there is a clear, necessary public reason, such as protecting others from harm. The key point is that society should serve people, not become a justification for overriding them whenever it is convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena bagi saya itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai Amerika, hak individu adalah perlindungan utama terhadap mayoritas yang bisa saja salah atau pemerintah yang ingin jalan pintas atas nama ketertiban. Memang ada batas yang sah ketika tindakan seseorang membahayakan orang lain, tetapi batas itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena masyarakat menginginkan hasil yang lebih nyaman. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan logika bahwa “demi harmoni” orang harus diam; masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat justru berani melindungi kebebasan bahkan saat itu tidak paling mudah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society’s interests should not take priority over individual rights by default, because that standard is too easy to stretch into control and conformity. From an Indonesian perspective, I am very cautious about arguments in the name of harmony, order, or the common good, because they can quickly become excuses to silence minorities or pressure people to obey. That said, I do not see individual rights as absolute in every situation; they can be limited when there is a real and necessary reason to protect others from harm. For me, the better principle is that society exists to protect people, not to override them whenever convenience or majority preference demands it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu; menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, bukan dikalahkan secara otomatis oleh kepentingan masyarakat. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama ketertiban atau “kebaikan bersama,” penyalahgunaan kekuasaan jadi lebih mudah terjadi. Saya setuju bahwa ada keadaan ketika hak bisa dibatasi, tetapi harus benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan untuk mencegah bahaya nyata, bukan sekadar karena masyarakat ingin hasil yang lebih nyaman atau seragam. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling sering menang atas individu, melainkan yang sanggup melindungi kebebasan sambil tetap menjaga orang lain dari kerugian.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
